segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْمَرْأَةِ تَخْتَضِبُ وَ هِيَ حَائِضٌ قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ بِهِ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْمَرْأَةِ تَخْتَضِبُ وَ هِيَ حَائِضٌ قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ بِهِ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Sahl Bin Al Yas’a, from his father who said,
‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> about the woman dyeing (her hair) and she is menstruating. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no prolem with it’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Sahl Bin Al Yas’a, from his father who said,

‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> about the woman dyeing (her hair) and she is menstruating. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no prolem with it’.

segments: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Sahl ibn al-Yasa’ from his father who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a woman who uses dye during her Hayd (menses). He (the Imam) said, ’It is not harmful.”’
en.sarwar.text: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Sahl ibn al-Yasa’ from his father who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a woman who uses dye during her Hayd (menses). He (the Imam) said, ’It is not harmful.”’

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/256)
gradings.label: حسن
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/256)

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سَهْلِ بْنِ الْيَسَعِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ

segments: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي إِبْرَاهِيمَ ( عليه السلام ) تَخْتَضِبُ الْمَرْأَةُ وَ هِيَ طَامِثٌ قَالَ نَعَمْ .
arabic.text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي إِبْرَاهِيمَ ( عليه السلام ) تَخْتَضِبُ الْمَرْأَةُ وَ هِيَ طَامِثٌ قَالَ نَعَمْ .

segments: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Al Nazar Bin Suweyd, from Muhammad Bin Abu Hamza who said,
‘I said to Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup> (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>), ‘Can the woman dye (her hair) and she is menstruating?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Al Nazar Bin Suweyd, from Muhammad Bin Abu Hamza who said,

‘I said to Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup> (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>), ‘Can the woman dye (her hair) and she is menstruating?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes’.

segments: 2. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id from al-Nadr ibn Suwayd from Muhammad ibn abu Hamzah who has said the following: “I once asked abu Ibrahim, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, if a woman experiencing Hayd (menses) can use dyes. He (the Imam) said, ‘Yes, she can do so.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id from al-Nadr ibn Suwayd from Muhammad ibn abu Hamzah who has said the following: “I once asked abu Ibrahim, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, if a woman experiencing Hayd (menses) can use dyes. He (the Imam) said, ‘Yes, she can do so.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/256)
gradings.label: صحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/256)

narratorChain.raw: أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنِ النَّضْرِ بْنِ سُوَيْدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ قَالَ
